prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为20669→20634→20885→34040→33035。2021–2023年位次稳定在2.06万–2.09万之间，2024年因浙江省高考改革及选科调整 ，位次大幅后移至34040名，2025年小幅回升至33035名，近两年基准位次约3.3万左右；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年20人、2022–2024年均为27人、2025 年25人；2026年计划23人，较2025年减少2人，缩招约8%，理论上使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 陕西师范大学为教育部直属211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学排名2026年第63名，近年排名稳定在62–71区间，属于中上游211师范院校；2024年该校曾出现师德师风相关负面舆情（副教授被举报性骚扰），2025–2026 年周期内未出现重大声誉事件；抖音平台总热度排名第15位（高热），手写录取通知书等正面内容传播广泛，整体报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中，中国语 言文学A-、心理学A-、教育学A-，共3个A-学科，在师范类院校中具备较强学科实力，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度2024年为"分 化观望"，公费师范生政策保障就业但竞争激烈；计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高。浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人（仅总人数，无分科），较2025 年29.08万人大幅增长约37.6%，全省考生规模激增将显著加剧各层次院校的竞争压力。；陕西师范大学位于陕西省西安市，属西部 高校；浙江省考生对省外211师范院校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响，但该校作为部属六大师范之一，在全国范围内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次33035名、20 26年招生计划缩招2人（计划变化率-8%）、浙江省考生总数大幅增加约37.6%等因素：缩招使位次理论上移约1586名（更易进），但考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应远超缩招影 响。经综合权衡，预测2026年最低录取位次约31649名，较2025年33035名小幅前移（位次数字减小），区间31149–32149名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 中国语言文学类（含汉语言文学（师范）、汉语言文学（拔尖基地班））
- 历史学类（含历史学（师范）、历史学（新文科班））
- 地理科学类（含地理科学（师范）、地理科学（创新实验班））。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学（师范）、数学与应用数学（国俊班）、统计学）
- 物理学类（含物理学（师范）、物理学（恒元班）、电子信息科学与技术）
- 新闻传播学类（含新闻学、编辑出版学、网络与新媒体）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术（创新实验班）、软件工程、人工智能）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物科学类（含生物科学（师范）、生物科学（理科基地班）、生态学）
- 心理学类（含心理学（泽如拔尖基地班）、应用心理学）
- 大数据管理与应用。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间31149–32149名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（数学类、计算机类），一档专业（中国语言文学类、历史学类）作为冲刺，三档专业（生物科学类、心理学类） 作为保底。位次优于区间下限（<31149名）可重点冲刺一档王牌师范专业；位次接近区间上限（>32149名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were 20669 → 20634 → 20885 → 34040 → 33035. Rankings were stable between 20,600 and 20,900 from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to Zhejiang's college entrance exam reform and subject selection adjustments, the ranking significantly dropped to 34040, and slightly recovered to 33035 in 2025, with a baseline of approximately 33,000 in recent two years. The university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang for Comprehensive category was 20 in 2021, 27 from 2022 to 2024, 25 in 2025, and 23 in 2026, a decrease of 2 from 2025, about 8% reduction, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shaanxi Normal University is a key university under the Ministry of Education, a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. It ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 62–71 range in recent years, making it a mid-to-upper tier 211 normal university. In 2024, there was negative public opinion related to teacher ethics (an associate professor was reported for sexual harassment), but no major reputation incidents occurred in the 2025–2026 cycle. On Douyin platform, its overall popularity ranked 15th (high heat), with positive content such as handwritten admission letters widely spread, leading to high overall application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has three A- disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature, Psychology, and Education, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength among normal universities, attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors in 2024 was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', with publicly-funded normal students having guaranteed employment but fierce competition. Majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information continued to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Zhejiang is about 400,000 (total only, no subject breakdown), a significant increase of about 37.6% from 291,000 in 2025, which will markedly intensify competition across all levels of institutions. Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a western university. Zhejiang candidates' willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 normal universities is influenced by regional preferences, but as one of the six key normal universities under the Ministry of Education, it has high national recognition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 33035, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 2 students (plan change rate -8%), and the significant increase of about 37.6% in the total number of Zhejiang candidates: the enrollment reduction theoretically moves the ranking up by about 1586 places (easier to enter), but the intensified competition effect from the surge in candidate numbers far outweighs the reduction impact. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is about 31649, a slight improvement (smaller ranking number) from 2025's 33035, with a range of 31149–32149.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature (Normal), Chinese Language and Literature (Top-notch Base Class))
- History (including History (Normal), History (New Liberal Arts Class))
- Geographical Sciences (including Geographical Science (Normal), Geographical Science (Innovation Experimental Class)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal), Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Guojun Class), Statistics)
- Physics (including Physics (Normal), Physics (Hengyuan Class), Electronic Information Science and Technology)
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Editing and Publishing, Network and New Media)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology (Innovation Experimental Class), Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Science (Normal), Biological Science (Science Base Class), Ecology)
- Psychology (including Psychology (Zeru Top-notch Base Class), Applied Psychology)
- Big Data Management and Application.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 31149–32149, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Computer Science) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, History) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Biological Sciences, Psychology) as safety choices. If your ranking is better than the lower limit (<31149), you can aim for Tier 1 flagship normal majors; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>32149), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.
